description: Evaluate growth programs for working professionals, with emphasis on role application, support, and advancement.

examples: We need to know whether our professional development program is helping employees grow in role.
Help me collect feedback about our manager-supported upskilling initiative.

nodes.label: Growth objective fit
nodes.description: Clarify whether the program matched the participant's growth goals and role needs.

nodes.label: On-the-job application
nodes.description: Surface how learners are applying the development in current work.

nodes.label: Manager and team support
nodes.description: Assess whether the environment made learning use realistic and encouraged.

nodes.label: Growth blockers
nodes.description: Identify structural, cultural, or time barriers blocking development.

nodes.label: Future commitment and retention
nodes.description: Understand whether the experience influences ongoing development and retention intent.
